info.title: Rustle REST Hook API
info.description: Register and remove webhook callbacks for App Store & Google Play review and rating events. Authenticate with an API token issued in the console (Integrations) as `Authorization: Bearer rsk_…` or `X-API-Key: rsk_…`.

get.summary:
The apps this account already watches — populates an integration's app dropdown. One
entry per `(store, app_id)` with the watched storefronts rolled up into `countries`
(an integration picks an app, not an app-storefront pair). Under attach-only, `subscribe`
accepts only a `(store, app_id)` listed here, and covers its `countries` by default.

200.description: Apps this account watches (store, app_id, display_name, countries[])

get.summary: List the account's hooks (convenience; not required by the REST Hook flow).

post.summary:
REST Hook **subscribe**: create an endpoint (callback URL + generated secret + source)
and bind a delivery to an app the account **already watches** in the console. Attach-only
— it never enrolls a new app into the poll set; an unwatched app is a `409`. Idempotency
is the platform's responsibility (each "on" creates one hook); we return a fresh `id`
each time.

200.description: Hook created. The HMAC `secret` is returned once.

400.description: Invalid body (store, target_url, event_type, star band, or rating rule)

409.description: The account does not watch this app yet — add it in the console first

delete.summary: REST Hook **unsubscribe**: tear down the endpoint and its watches (GCs the poll set).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The hook id returned by subscribe

404.description: No hook with that id for this account

get.summary:
A synthetic representative event for a platform's "test trigger" step (Zapier's
`performList`). Static — it never touches tenant data, so it needs only a valid token.

200.description: A one-element array holding a synthetic event of the requested type

ErrorResponse.description: The body returned by every `/api/v1` failure: `{ "error": "<message>" }`.

error.description: Human-readable description of what went wrong.
error.example: store must be apple or google

external_ref.description: The platform's correlation crumb, if one was supplied at subscribe time.

id.description: The hook id (pass to `DELETE /api/v1/hooks/{id}` to remove it).

target_url.description: The callback URL events are delivered to.

app_id.description: Store-native app id (Apple numeric id, Google package name).

filter_competitor.description:
`true` = deliver only reviews that mention a competitor. Two-state: `false` and omitted
both mean "any".

filter_is_bug_report.description:
Fixed enrichment filters on a `review.created` hook (optional; `review.created` only).
Each narrows which classified reviews are delivered; applied at fan-out against the
review's enrichment block — never on the platform side. Rejected (400) on other hooks.

`true` = deliver only bug reports. Two-state: `false` and omitted both mean "any".

filter_severity_min.description:
Minimum severity to deliver: `medium` | `high` (a floor, not an exact match). `low` is
accepted but means "any" (every review is ≥ low). Omit for any.

filter_theme.description: Deliver only reviews carrying this enrichment theme (e.g. `stability_crash`). Omit for any.

source.description: Provenance hint from the platform app (`zapier`/`make`/`n8n`); defaults to `api`.

target_url.description: The callback URL the platform wants events delivered to (Zapier's catch URL, etc.).

countries.description:
The storefronts this hook covers — every country the account watches for the app.
A platform narrows further downstream on the payload's `country`.

id.description: The handle the platform stores and passes back to unsubscribe.

secret.description:
The HMAC signing secret, so a platform app may verify `x-radar-signature` if it
wants. Returned once, over the bearer-authed TLS channel.

tags.name: samples
tags.description: Synthetic events for a platform's test step
